import requests as req
import traceback

try:
    r = req.get("http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner-windows.exe", timeout=30, stream=True)
    total = 0
    chunks = 0
    for chunk in r.iter_content(chunk_size=1024*1024):
        total += len(chunk)
        chunks += 1
        if chunks > 5:
            break
    result = f"chunks={chunks},bytes={total},status={r.status_code}"
except Exception as e:
    result = f"error: {traceback.format_exc()[-200:]}"
